summary: Multiple vehicles are traveling on a multi-lane road under clear skies with ample sunlight. Cars and vans move steadily across the lanes.

events_timeline.event: Cars and vans travel smoothly along the multi-laned road.

uncertainties: The precise identities of all vehicles are unclear due to reflections and glare.

risk_assessment.why: All vehicles maintain consistent speeds and positions without abrupt changes or collisions.
